user_query: I'm a student learning programming and I need to know the supported languages and their versions for an online code compiler. Can you fetch the list of languages and versions using the Online Code Compiler API? Also, provide me with some example code snippets in those languages using the Test API.

TaskList.description: Fetch the list of supported programming languages and their versions from the Online Code Compiler API.
For each programming language obtained in step 1, retrieve example code snippets using the Test API.
